message:
refactor(sync): migrate Mutex and Semaphore internals from std::sync::Mutex to parking_lot

Continue the parking_lot migration (following Notify in c89995c) to the
remaining sync primitives:

sync/mutex.rs:
- Replace StdMutex<MutexState> with parking_lot::Mutex<MutexState>
- Remove all .lock().expect("...poisoned") calls in favor of direct
  .lock() (parking_lot does not poison on panic)
- Affected paths: is_locked(), try_lock(), release_lock()

sync/semaphore.rs:
- Replace StdMutex<SemaphoreState> with parking_lot::Mutex<SemaphoreState>
- Remove poison-handling boilerplate from available_permits(),
  is_closed(), close(), try_acquire(), Acquire::poll()

Both primitives retain identical semantics — only the internal lock
implementation changes. parking_lot::Mutex is already a dependency
and provides better performance for the short critical sections used
by these waiter-queue operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
